calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-20-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Val Hornstein for plaintiff/respondent Hornstein Law Offices, Prof. Corp.; Juan T. Huunh, representative of Dragon Panda Shirts, Inc. for defendants/appellants

This case comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are affirmed.

Val Hornstein testifies on behalf of plaintiff/respondent. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Exhibit 1: Invoice No. DPSI160630 dated 5 July 2016
Exhibit 2: Letter from NBA Properties, Inc. dated June 2, 2016
Exhibit 4: Email from Juan Huynh dated January 13, 2019

Juan Huynh testifies on his own behalf and as representative for defendant/appellant Dragon Panda Shirts, Inc. The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Defendant Exhibit 1: Document titled Objection dated March 20, 2019
Defendant Exhibit 2: Copy of email dated Jun 6, 2016 to Mathew

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission. Judge Pro Tem: Diana Kruze, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-17-2019 Granted Per Written Order

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-20-2019 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-15-2019 Continued To Feb-20-19 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 506
